artPrompt: A magical moment of paperwork dividing itself: a single blank carbon-copy form splits into three drifting layered sheets — white, yellow, and a fading pink ghost-page dissolving into cyan motes — swirling up out of a clerk's outstretched hands toward humming overhead lights. Filing cabinets blur in the beige background. The triplet sheets stack vertically through the wide frame. Wide 4:3 landscape, faint arcane glow, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: In Triplicate
text: Draw two cards. Then keep one, file one with the clerk, and lose one in the system. (Discard a card.)
flavorText: The white copy is yours. The yellow copy is ours. The pink copy was never real.
